title: uraria acaulis
intro: Uraria acaulis, also known as Indian medicine or Kali musali, is a plant species belonging to the family Leguminosae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of urinary tract issues, such as kidney stones and bladder infections. The health benefits of Uraria acaulis include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to relieve symptoms of urinary tract problems and reduce pain and swelling. In herbal preparations, Uraria acaulis is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicines.
